title: Unser Team - Die Heim-EM 2024
overview: At the UEFA EURO 2024 in Germany, the DFB team under Julian Nagelsmann sparked new enthusiasm despite their quarter-final exit. The RTL documentary shows the team's transformation into a unit with team spirit and passion.
